textByHash.318ca571a3e3703e3850b3a70218da8575fceb6f: I just lost some very good friends of mine. I can't walk away from that. The vampyres need to pay.
textByHash.22c33935b6fb0cc3b89ee18d34dfb61ec91f8545: Hopefully Flaygain's work will help us against the vampyres.
textByHash.4c5631259394a1b711b8d11696b2a4884b8e0a6e: Ranis Drakan himself has sent an open invitation to the people of Meiyerditch, inviting them to Ver Sinhaza.
textByHash.ffb61f7aa8c14098d49997a17f6f11c6ced974d0: Apparently he intends to officially announce the defeat of the Myreque.
textByHash.49ff42e26356f43667920b5a849a6201bc3dfef9: You don't need to convince me. It's time to show these monsters that their days are done.
textByHash.a70b3b4e7bc3a811b9caabc8d44155a07aa07896: Hello, player. I'll be leaving for Ver Sinhaza soon. You should meet me there.
textByHash.f917f925a454880a41e371d14b14e569df234cdd: Well met. Ranis will be starting his speech soon. Are you ready?
textByHash.48980a046fc7a804b1b4cb89e349a4dd14e2066a: Well just let me know when you are.
textByHash.8fe30fe99e05391778ec6404e71b97cb43507b39: That was amazing. Now you'd better get back to the hideout. This place will be filled with vampyres soon.
textByHash.538fa26bc8f13ec07baa9b30329e87f5f056d86f: That's right. I recovered this medallion from Ranis, you might find a good use for it.
textByHash.f5c05c6434e71ea9f743f3d8481d89c9fc2d5a05: Much better thanks to you. It actually feels like we're winning for once.
textByHash.82a3182feaf1ba0d899f9c3c888bdfabfd37f2a5: You'd best talk to Veliaf and Safalaan. They are the big bosses after all.
textByHash.bb0d4eeb48a6d3c9812ad06681b5c0c003a07794: Or we could just kill both you and your brother and take back Morytania for humanity!
textByHash.34d5be6aa754b4ef087f836301af5f6f03967c1a: Appears risky to me, friend. Vampyres are the enemy and she is a vampyre.
textByHash.12d21e2300d5057cf803fafaec2897452485bcf5: We do. But some we take because we have to, others because we choose to.
textByHash.e354326216c50db4baaa52f3e7b257aa4325fbe9: We took an unnecessary risk back in Meiyerditch with Serafina. Look how that turned out. Flaygian, Mekritus and Andiess. All dead because of that risk.
textByHash.5589bc06b9ab2aa2cdffb85fb5016c5aaa03fd59: Flaygian and Mekritus? Not particularly. They were good men, and it was sad to lose them, but we were not close.
textByHash.e109804fbcaf7771320d34a25e128dab556567cd: Now, Andiess on the other hand, he and I grew up together. Before Safalaan found us, he was all I had. But now he's gone and nothing I do will ever bring him back.
textByHash.7a6b6fa233da51788ed67f5565099bd9a0906e57: No. He could not have known what would happen. But that doesn't mean we should take more unnecessary risks.
textByHash.4a7e2fbde971dd2763533df20bd51bd9a7ec2237: I want to believe that, I really do. I just don't know if I'm ready to lose any more friends.
textByHash.34fa9bc6d833861bf7cb874911ed9039c5668f5a: I... I guess you're right. Okay then, I'm in. Let's kill him, for Andiess, and for everyone else who's suffered because of him.
textByHash.c69982fa68cd1a99f88e631d4ad4ff9db48a4665: I'd better not disturb you. You need to tell the others about the plan.
textByHash.27cfbec16c96cd95fb4742bbd71780cdded3236d: Do you think we're ready for this?
textByHash.cfec5e2a275c067cb0f9d2d1248df6c413458e89: Lowerniel's a much bigger fish though.
textByHash.a0d3327f6cb8b9345473f4bda51219a616d9b8df: Good? It is not good at all. The vampyres increase their efforts to crush us underfoot. These are hard times indeed.
